title: BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Full Stack Developer in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!
